x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Software Asset Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist SAM AI insights are presented to analysts. Without it, AI-generated license recommendations and reclamation suggestions are produced but never surfaced where SAM analysts work.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_sam_workspace"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Software Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Software Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist SAM AI insights including license recommendations and reclamation suggestions are surfaced in context for SAM analysts." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_sam_ws"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Software Asset Workspace is active", finding: "Software Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist SAM AI insights are surfaced in context for SAM analysts." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "Software Asset Workspace not found or inactive", finding: "Software Asset Workspace is not active. Now Assist SAM AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface for SAM analysts." }; })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Software Asset Workspace via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist SAM AI insights to surface in context for software asset analysts.
